title: geniostoma helleri
intro: Geniostoma helleri, also known as the Heller's geniostoma, is a species of flowering plant in the family Goodeniaceae, native to the Pacific Islands. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and fight off bacteria and viruses. The plant's health benefits include its potential to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its ability to aid in wound healing and reduce fever. In herbal preparations, Geniostoma helleri is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
